channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: A16z’s Andreessen lands Federal Reserve role as AI reshapes policy debate
item.description: The Fed named a16z co-founder Marc Andreessen to co-lead an AI productivity and jobs task force under Chair Kevin Warsh’s policy review.

item.title: MiCA licensing only the beginning as crypto custodians face scrutiny
item.description: A MiCA license allows crypto firms to operate in the EU, but the ESMA’s review will test whether custodians can meet the required security and resilience standards.

item.title: Strategy Bitcoin Sales 'Mostly Noise,' Standard Chartered Says, Holding $100K BTC Call
item.description: The bank argues that the treasury giant's Bitcoin sales are a short-term distraction, reiterating its $100,000 year-end price target.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Will the crypto lobby's $189M campaign get CLARITY over the line?
item.description: As the CLARITY Act advances, crypto's growing political influence in Washington is under scrutiny. But the crypto lobby's massive campaign spend is only part of the story.

item.title: OKX, MetaMask, Matter Labs back dispute resolution court for AI agents
item.description: The Genlayer Foundation is leading the 27-firm consortium that makes AI-based payments, escrow and dispute resolution interoperable.

item.title: US charges prisoner over alleged laundering of seized Kraken crypto
item.description: US prosecutors charged Rossen Iossifov over the alleged laundering of $290,000 in forfeited crypto from a Kraken account.

item.title: Morning Minute: Robinhood Chain Explodes Onto the Crypto Scene
item.description: Plus, Circle wins a national bank charter and pops 10%. And the Clarity Act gets a new draft while the clock is ticking…

item.title: Wall Street banks tighten prediction market rules for staff as insider fears spread
item.description: Wall Street banks, including Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley, are restricting employee prediction market trades as insider trading fears spread across Polymarket and Kalshi.

item.title: Circle soars after securing U.S. trust bank approval in crypto expansion
item.description: The approval adds to a growing list of crypto firms seeking federal banking licenses as the industry moves into the regulated financial system.

item.title: Japan's 'invest locally' plan likely to spur demand for assets like bitcoin, gold
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 10, 2026

item.title: USDC issuer Circle wins final approval for US national trust bank charter
item.description: Circle announces it received final OCC approval for a national trust bank that will initially serve the company and affiliates, with possible future custody services for institutional clients.

item.title: Jailed Fraudster Charged With Moving $290K in Forfeited Crypto From Prison
item.description: A convicted launderer serving time for a $5 million scheme allegedly moved crypto that a court had ordered him to forfeit.

item.title: Japanese lender launches Bitcoin-backed loans of up to $6.2M
item.description: CRYL is offering Bitcoin-backed loans to individuals and businesses as Japanese firms explore broader uses for BTC in lending and credit markets.

item.title: Crypto defies equity weakness as altcoin optimism builds into the weekend
item.description: The price of bitcoin hit $64,400, retesting a level it failed to penetrate on Monday, with a break higher opening the path toward the June 15 peak of $67,250.

item.title: TeraWulf eyes $3.5B debt raise for Anthropic-linked data center: Report
item.description: Bitcoin miner TeraWulf is reportedly seeking $3.5 billion in debt financing led by Morgan Stanley for its Kentucky data center campus leased by AI company Anthropic.

item.title: North Carolina Bill Recognizes CFTC's ‘Federal Regulatory Authority’ Over Prediction Markets
item.description: The state's budget law leaves oversight of Kalshi and Polymarket to the CFTC and taxes them at 6%, far below what other states are pursuing.

item.title: Metaplanet explores Bitcoin-backed digital credit with JPYC in Japan
item.description: Metaplanet said it is studying Bitcoin-backed digital credit products in Japan with JPYC and Progmat, but no product has been launched.

item.title: Polymarket seeks approval to bring margin trading to U.S. customers
item.description: Polymarket's application to allow users to take positions that are not fully collateralized follows authorization granted to rival Kalshi in March.

item.title: Bitcoin returns to $64.3K with new 3-week BTC price highs imminent
item.description: Bitcoin bulls faced "crucial resistance" at $65,000 next as BTC price action diverged from oil and US dollar strength.

item.title: Bitcoin's $60,000-$70,000 range becomes third most traded range in history
item.description: Bitcoin has spent 307 days in the $60,000-$70,000 range, the third longest consolidation in any $10,000 price band.

item.title: Metaplanet explores bringing bitcoin-backed digital credit to Japan
item.description: The bitcoin treasury company is working with JPYC and Progmat to explore tokenized credit products backed by bitcoin, aiming to create efficient, 24/7 credit markets in Japan.

item.title: Bitcoin gets a green light from a reliable momentum gauge. Here are key levels to watch
item.description: A smoother long-term MACD just flipped bullish, pointing to more upside. Here are key levels that will decide if the ongoing bounce turns into a full blown uptrend.

item.title: Live updates: Bitcoin takes aim at $65,000, erasing losses from earlier this week
item.description: Spot bitcoin funds lost about $95 million on Thursday and ether funds roughly $52 million, ending the one bright spot in crypto's institutional flows even as prices rallied.

item.title: EU parliament passes ‘chat control,’ allowing private chat scans until 2028
item.description: EU lawmakers have again allowed tech firms to scan chats for abuse material, but exempted end-to-end encrypted messages.

item.title: Robinhood Chain sees over $70M in ETH bridged during first week
item.description: Robinhood’s choice to use Ethereum further solidifies its position as the “ultimate settlement layer and liquidity foundation for tokenized assets,” said HashKey Group’s Tim Sun.

item.title: XRP up 2% as buyers push through $1.10 resistance
item.description: A late-session volume surge carried XRP above its recent range, with traders now watching whether $1.10 can hold as support.

item.title: Bitcoin's quiet split: Strong in USD, lagging in JPY as Yen rises on intervention fears
item.description: A sharp rise in the yen has left bitcoin and other major cryptocurrencies underperforming in yen terms compared with their dollar-based trading pairs.

item.title: Zcash targets July 28 launch for Ironwood network upgrade
item.description: Zcash’s next upgrade will replace the once-compromised Orchard pool and may offer clues about whether counterfeit tokens were created via a recent bug.

item.title: Bitcoin zips higher to nearly $64,000 as chip rally and yen strength drive gains
item.description: Bitcoin is up 4.2% over seven days that contained an oil shock, a bond selloff and two rounds of U.S. strikes on Iran.

item.title: Hackers tried to backdoor Injective NPM package to steal wallet keys
item.description: The incident is significant for developers and applications that handle Injective wallet workflows, Socket researchers said.

item.title: DeFi may be ‘quietly re-rating’ given outperformance against Bitcoin: Bitwise
item.description: “DeFi usually swings much harder than Bitcoin, so holding up this well is unusual,” says Bitwise, as DeFi tokens have outperformed Bitcoin.

item.title: Bitwise: Crypto Posts Third Straight Quarter of Negative Returns, Longest Streak Since 2022 Bitwise said the Bitwise 10 Large Cap Crypto Index fell 15.4% in Q2, with eight of its 10 constituents declining, while spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded their worst quarter of o - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE85LWQwZFduV1ZVVFlISWFJWHVFR1lxMUhQZmxiN0E0cDUtR1cwQkVmZW11LUhYNW5BUE5xeXpRZGZkUHJrNHc1Ukd0cjVjWHpvdVNrNldqWUwxbVNoLWxmUS1rVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitwise: Crypto Posts Third Stra…

item.title: Bitcoin fell to its 2nd most oversold level in history on the monthly chart 🚨 The only time it was lower was December 2022, when $BTC went on to soar 660% over the next 3 years 📈 🥳 🤑 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5FN0YyYzA1djlZdExoOEtYaXlUS3k0NE1mSzJpdzdmQnBJLXVzV25nQkhFdm9FdU0ycGJDaDZmWGRxZGxoc0pxVDl3Vl9SNW1BOW1CRHRRVTRzLVdwRkE?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin fell to its 2nd most oversold l…

item.title: New Hampshire snuffs out trailblazing state-government bitcoin bond effort
item.description: At its last stage for government approval, the state's executive council rejected the bond project 3-2.

item.title: AI Agents Could Be Turned Into Botnets Through Hallucinations, Researchers Warn
item.description: Researchers warn AI agents could be tricked into downloading malicious code by exploiting the same hallucinations that cause chatbots to make mistakes.

item.title: Coinbase chief legal officer to transition to advisory role on July 31
item.description: The soon-to-be former chief legal officer did not announce the details of his next move but said that he would continue working with the Board of Coinbase National Trust Company.

item.title: Avalanche Treasury Firm AVAX One Reclaims Nasdaq Compliance After Reverse Stock Split
item.description: AVAX One, which stockpiles the native token of the Avalanche crypto network, is back in Nasdaq's good graces after a reverse stock split.

item.title: Grayscale's CFO exits after 7 years with crypto asset manager
item.description: Edward McGee stepped down after seven years, months after distribution chief John Hoffman left for Ondo Finance.

item.title: Perplexity Fine-Tuned a Chinese AI Model to Match Claude Opus 4.8 at One-Third the Cost
item.description: The company's post-trained GLM 5.2 preview pairs a cheaper open-source base with a frontier advisor—and it's already live in production.

item.title: With SEC fight over, Coinbase's top legal exec Grewal moves on, and others reassigned
item.description: Coinbase Chief Legal Officer Paul Grewal will depart the exchange, though he'll continue as an adviser, he said Thursday.

item.title: Arbitrum jumps 19% benefitting from Robinhood's $568 million onchain trading frenzy
item.description: The brokerage's new blockchain is off to a fast start, with memecoin trading boosting activity and revenue flowing back to the Arbitrum ecosystem.

item.title: Anthropic AI Oversight Board Adds Ben Bernanke, Who Oversaw 2008 Financial Crisis at Fed
item.description: Former Fed Chair Ben Bernanke will have the power to appoint Anthropic board members as part of company's Long-Term Benefit Trust.

item.title: Bitdeer stock jumps 14% as company expands US mining hardware production
item.description: Bitdeer shares rallied after the company announced a $36 million Nevada manufacturing facility that will produce its SEALMINER Bitcoin mining machines and expand its hardware business.

item.title: White House says it received no Democratic response related to SEC, CFTC vacancies
item.description: Both US financial regulators are understaffed at the leadership level and lacking Democratic commissioners, with no announcement from President Donald Trump on filling the roles.

item.title: NEW: Public companies have bought 110,000 Bitcoin in Q2 2026 👀 Public companies now hold over 1.26 million BTC, which is more than 6% of Bitcoin’s total supply 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE0zelEzODBqRE9nOURYdHFWMjdwSDNsNzVkZnZEQU9yc2NVcGlqUVBHTndjeWpfLS1IT21PZWdvNE1GaGxwUHg1TmF1cUh1LWpKaUVpUm02UUhsUnhEV281Z05zZFZsMW8?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: Public companies have …

item.title: Phantom, Hyperliquid ask CFTC to modernize rules for onchain derivatives
item.description: The companies urged the regulator to exempt blockchain developers and non-custodial wallet providers from rules designed for traditional financial intermediaries.

item.title: Newest version of crypto Clarity Act may drop as soon as next week, sources say
item.description: After a long stretch without breakthroughs in the crypto market structure bill, insiders say a new draft may emerge in a final push for late-July action — though it still lacks bipartisan buy-in.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Turns AI Loose on ETH Network to Find Bugs Before Hackers Do
item.description: Ethereum researchers are using AI agents to hunt for vulnerabilities, shifting security work from finding bugs to proving which ones are real.

item.title: Gary Cardone: "I think I will see $40k #bitcoin this year. In fact I think I'll see $40k before November." "I also would like to see that. Because I like price capitulation over time capitulation." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE51T1JuYThTV2xoNWJlRlI5LS1PcmVjazJkTEphbXhqcEx1UGZHTEFKUjlxZThoN0J3WUl0R05xNDZlb21XWWhGVDF2WVI4cDZpX0R4YTQ4eGU2VHJxelVoODlFVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Gary Cardone: "I think I will se…

item.title: Billions flowing out of bitcoin ETFs and private credit funds suggest rising market risks
item.description: Redemption requests in the $2 trillion private credit market surged to $15.6 billion in the second quarter, dwarfing bitcoin ETF outflows.

item.title: Former Meta Engineer Explains Why He Sold All His Bitcoin Former Meta engineer @techleadhd has resurfaced after a period of silence, admitting he has liquidated his entire Bitcoin position. He argues that Bitcoin's core problem is that "attention is liquidity" - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBUdWtfMkxGNU4wSmZoQ2R4MTQyZ0NzUGxjNjhmUW1MT1FubU9ZTmN5bUtqR1RKaUdEbU9LUlBFOU1RV1JDeS1wT3BfdHFHQzVaNlluWnVXVEFQeUdkalo0aTJ5Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">Former Meta Engineer Explains Wh…

item.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6 Sol: Here’s How It Stacks Up Against Other AI Models
item.description: OpenAI's new flagship model is out, after spending two weeks locked behind a government-approved preview. It lands the same week Fable 5 leaves Anthropic's subscription plans.

item.title: Swift Readies Ledger for 24/7 Token Transfers—Though True Settlement Is Stuck on Old Rails
item.description: Swift’s pilot allows 17 global banks to transfer tokenized deposits on weekends, but ultimate settlement still relies on legacy systems.

item.title: I joined @kornelijalaura at the @xapobankapp Conference in London on July 1 for a fireside chat on Bitcoin as Digital Capital, the emergence of Digital Credit, and the path to Bitcoin-backed Digital Money. Fix the money, fix the world. $BTC 00:42 — Bitcoin be - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9HRF9FMFU5UjRiM3BwQktod0RDdUNCZjdZSThjRjd3SEZRQmhOZkJueEQ3eElPS09VNzU0S3NiZjUzQWR6eTZjaWhYekZSUERDUXB0UkpUN2NFaUE?oc=5" target="_blank">I joined @kornelijalaura at the @xapobankap…

item.title: The Protocol Security Team has been pointing AI agents at Ethereum’s protocol code. Our core takeaway wasn't about finding bugs, it was about triage. Here are field notes from the work. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9aekFZQXpWTktMekxJcVR6VGZVZXUtNFZ3dmRCY3Q1c1AyS0pmN2lOeTVQWEpWVFB2LUZXbTJCWEZ3a056RlVaSHRmZElENzhZeWkxaUVJQ2t4dy1TTUNiUjZVSQ?oc=5" target="_blank">The Protocol Security Team has b…

item.title: AI contracts, not bitcoin, now drive miner valuations, and Cipher and TeraWulf look cheap, says analyst
item.description: Compass Point analysts Michael Donovan and Ed Engel said markets are giving little credit to future AI data center pipelines despite billions of dollars in signed leases.

item.title: Implemented in 9 months. Global from day one. Swift's blockchain-based ledger is ready for use, with ANZ, BNP Paribas, BNY, Citi, DBS Bank, First Abu Dhabi Bank (FAB), FirstRand, HSBC, Itaú Unibanco, Lloyds Banking Group, Mashreq, MUFG, OCBC, Stan - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFA2enpXWW1mX24zWllpemctZGhPeXhaWUdCZU5LOWl3MTJWU195RV9iNnJmUGdlMVBWT1ZJMVNFQXZnaGNZbHpsR1kwOV9SVFZfaGgyOFJTYndac3BXZzNYV0IydUhydw?oc=5" target="_blank">Implemented in 9 months. Glo…

item.title: MARA Stock Pops as Bitcoin Miner Agrees to Acquire Massive Powered Texas Land Plot
item.description: MARA Holdings has agreed to purchase a sizable plot of land in Texas to power its Bitcoin mining and growing AI compute ambitions.

item.title: Labour MPs Push to Make UK Crypto Donation Ban Permanent
item.description: The lawmakers have tabled amendments to make the current moratorium permanent, as the fallout over Reform UK's funding widens.
